summary: Tested Activity Metrics feature in Performance Tracker. Backend API returns correct structure with total activities (messages, calls, visits, emails, total) and unique customer counts (unique_messages, unique_calls, unique_visits, unique_emails). Frontend displays both sections correctly with color-coded tiles and icons.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing Hyderabad - March plan with Pooja Sharma resource
context_for_next_testing_agent: Activity Metrics feature fully verified. Backend uses lead_activities collection with activity_type field (messaging, call, visit/meeting, email). Unique counts use distinct lead_id per activity type. All counts are 0 for test resources since no lead activities logged - this is expected behavior.

Backend_Activities_Structure.details: GET /api/performance/generate returns activities object with messages, calls, visits, emails, total fields

Backend_Unique_Counts.details: GET /api/performance/generate returns unique_messages, unique_calls, unique_visits, unique_emails fields

Backend_Productivity_Metrics.details: GET /api/performance/generate returns visit_productivity and call_productivity fields

Frontend_Total_Activities_Section.details: Activity Metrics card shows 'TOTAL ACTIVITIES' header with Messages, Calls, Customer Visits, Emails tiles

Frontend_Unique_Customers_Section.details: Activity Metrics card shows 'UNIQUE CUSTOMERS REACHED' header with Unique Visits, Unique Messages, Unique Calls, Unique Emails tiles

Frontend_Productivity_Display.details: Visit Productivity and Call Productivity metrics displayed at bottom of Activity Metrics card

Frontend_Summary_Card.details: Summary card shows 'ACTIVITIES' with total count and 'X unique visits' sub-text
